title: astragalus marschallianus
intro: Astragalus marschallianus, also known as four-leaf milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing overall well-being. Astragalus marschallianus can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
